metadata.title: US Tech & AI Companies Hiring PMs/APMs
metadata.purpose: Reference config for an automated parser that scans careers pages, applies the filters defined here, and upserts results into Supabase. This file does NOT track runs, listings, or applications — that all lives in Supabase. See supabase_schema.sql for the database schema.
metadata.uuid_generation_rule: uuid = uuidv5(deterministic_uuid_namespace, slug). Regenerating this file with the same slugs produces the same UUIDs, so Supabase foreign keys remain stable.

role_categories.label: PM/APM
role_categories.notes: Default Product Manager roles — uses title_include_keywords and title_exclude_keywords above

role_categories.label: Technical Program Manager
role_categories.notes: Entry-level / new grad TPM roles (0–3 YOE). Title must contain all three words: technical, program, manager.

role_categories.label: Software Engineer
role_categories.notes: Entry-level / new grad SWE roles (0–3 YOE). Title must contain both words: software, engineer.

location.rejection_rule: Reject only if role is restricted to a city/region NOT in allowed_cities AND not US-remote. 'Onsite - Dallas, TX only' is rejected. 'Remote (US)' is accepted. 'Hybrid - Austin' is accepted.

experience.notes: Roles with 4+ YOE required should be rejected. 'New grad' / 'entry level' / 'university grad' language flags tier 1 even without explicit YOE.

freshness.notes: 0-7 days = tier 1 (newly opened). 7-30 days = tier 2 (currently open). >30 days = skip.

sponsorship.notes: If user needs visa sponsorship, set both flags true. Parser scans JD for phrases like 'unable to sponsor', 'no sponsorship', 'must be authorized to work without sponsorship' and rejects accordingly.

compensation.notes: Leave null to disable. Parser accepts role if range_top >= min_base_salary_usd.

tier_1_signals: Experience requirement 0-2 years OR 'new grad' / 'entry level' / 'university grad'
Title is exactly 'Associate Product Manager' or 'APM'
Located in one of allowed_cities (not just remote)
tier_2_signals: Title is 'Product Manager' or 'Forward Deployed Product Manager'
tier_3_or_reject: Location not in allowed_cities and not US-remote
ranking_rules.domain_boost: Roles in companies whose domain_tags overlap with filters.preferred_domains should be ranked above otherwise-equivalent roles.

categories: Featured: Companies with Dedicated APM / Rotational Programs
AI Consulting & Services with Product Arms

company_field_descriptions.index: Integer position within this file version. NOT a stable identifier — use uuid or slug for foreign keys.
company_field_descriptions.uuid: Stable, deterministic UUID v5 derived from slug. Use as Supabase primary key.
company_field_descriptions.slug: Human-readable, URL-safe identifier. Stable across regenerations as long as the company name is unchanged.
company_field_descriptions.name: Company display name
company_field_descriptions.careers_url: Primary careers page URL (parser scans this)
company_field_descriptions.program_url: Dedicated APM program URL if separate (nullable)
company_field_descriptions.has_apm_program: Boolean — true if company runs a formal/named APM program
company_field_descriptions.apm_program_name: Name of the APM program if it has one (nullable)
company_field_descriptions.domain_tags: Array of domain tags for ranking against filters.preferred_domains
company_field_descriptions.target_roles: Role title strings the parser should search for at this company
company_field_descriptions.content_hash: 16-char SHA-256 of stable fields. Used by parser to detect config drift without full diff.
